name: Lucky Boomer
description: Lucky Boomer is a St. Patrick's Day version of Boomer who is available only on Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Lucky Boomer is a St. Patrick's Day version of Boomer who is available only on Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Lucky Boomer is here spreading the luck of the Skylanders!
personality: Lucky Boomer is known for spreading the luck of the Skylanders.

story.content: Lucky Boomer is a St. Patrick's Day version of Boomer who is available only on Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Lucky Boomer is here spreading the luck of the Skylanders!

trivia: Lucky Boomer, Hoppity Pop Fizz, Admiral Thumpback and Holiday Wash Buckler are the only Lost Islands exclusive Skylanders of 2013 without a specific house of their own.
Lucky Boomer's English voice actor is Joey Camen.
gameplay: Lucky Boomer is a seasonal Alter Ego of Boomer available only in Skylanders: Lost Islands. He features unique idle and poke animations within the game.
